title: Input schema for Agentic World Model Scraper

startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Seed pages or model listing pages (e.g., Sketchfab search or user pages). Prefer API endpoints when available.

useApi.title: Use official API when available
useApi.description: Prefer fetching model metadata from the official API if an API token is provided.

apiToken.title: API Token (Sketchfab or other)
apiToken.description: API token to access official endpoints (preferred). Leave empty to fall back to HTML scraping.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages/requests for the crawl.

downloadPreview.title: Download preview images
downloadPreview.description: Save model preview thumbnails to Key-Value Store (may increase storage).

downloadModelFiles.title: Download model files (dangerous)
downloadModelFiles.description: DO NOT enable unless you have explicit permission and license clearance. If enabled, attempts to download allowed formats.

minLikes.title: Minimum likes
minLikes.description: Only include models with at least this many likes (best-effort).

siteAllowList.title: Site allow list
siteAllowList.description: If set, only follow links inside these hostnames (recommended to restrict scope).

includeSubpages.title: Include subpages
includeSubpages.description: Follow links discovered on listing pages (site-limited by default).
